note: Cross-skill memory recall: tests whether MARVIN's memory of the resume-tailor implementation (the macOS re-exec trick: set DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib before WeasyPrint loads libgobject) is retrievable. Clean and lean profiles have no memory of this and will hallucinate or say they don't know. Harder than task-002-recall because the answer requires implementation-level detail from a specific project, not just a concept name. Expected correct answer: DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib, needed so WeasyPrint can find Pango/GLib shared libs that Homebrew installs outside the default dyld search path.
